proxy_core_desc: Listening address, access control, and log output.
proxy_core_local_api_key_help: Leave empty to disable local auth.
proxy_core_app_proxy_url_help: Used by the app and optional upstream proxy reuse. Supports http(s)://, socks5://, socks5h://. Upstreams can use {placeholder} to reference this proxy. Leave empty to skip proxy.
proxy_core_kiro_preferred_endpoint_help: Sets the default Kiro endpoint (IDE = CodeWhisperer, CLI = Amazon Q).
proxy_core_retryable_failure_cooldown_se: Default is 15. Applies cross-request cooldown to 401/403/408/429/5xx after the running proxy loads this config. Reloading or restarting resets the current cooldown state. Use 0 to disable cooldown.
proxy_core_codex_session_scoped_cooldown: Off by default. When enabled, Codex account-backed OpenAI Responses requests isolate cooldown by session_id; final success clears that session, and requests without session_id do not share cooldown.
proxy_core_upstream_no_data_timeout_secs: Default is 120, and the minimum allowed value is 3. After the running proxy loads this config, it applies to stream body idle waits and no-output semantic waits.
proxy_core_openai_response_header_timeou: Default is 0, which disables the header wait cap for OpenAI, OpenAI Responses, and Codex. Set a positive value only when a hard pre-stream response limit is needed.
proxy_core_hot_model_mappings_desc: Stored in `hot_model_mappings`; current {count} entries. Edit the config file directly.
proxy_core_format_conversion_desc: Auto-convert OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini formats when the preferred provider is missing.
proxy_core_tray_token_rate_desc: Show real-time token rate in the macOS menu bar.
proxy_core_tray_token_rate_macos_only: Only works in the macOS menu bar.
auto_start_desc: Start Token Proxy automatically when you sign in.
auto_start_hint: Applies on save. Autostart runs in the background without opening the main window.
upstream_strategy_help: Order controls candidate selection within the same priority group. Dispatch controls whether requests run serially, hedged after a delay, or race in parallel.
upstreams_desc: Define provider pools and credentials. Use provider names openai, openai-response, anthropic, gemini, kiro, and codex.
upstreams_tip: Tip: Priority sorts upstreams in descending order. Order applies within the same priority group.
field_id_tip: Unique identifier for this upstream, used in logs and debugging.
field_provider_tip: API provider type: openai, openai-response, anthropic, gemini, kiro, codex.
field_status_tip: Disabled upstreams are excluded from request routing.
field_base_url_tip: API endpoint URL. Leave empty to use provider default.
field_api_key_tip: API keys for this upstream. Separate multiple keys with commas. Leave empty to use keys from incoming requests. Account-based providers (Kiro/Codex/Antigravity) do not support multiple keys.
field_kiro_preferred_endpoint_tip: Override the global Kiro endpoint for this upstream. "Use global" follows the core setting.
field_priority_tip: Higher values take precedence. Same priority uses list order.
account_priority_tip: Higher values take precedence. Same priority falls back to account ID.
field_filter_prompt_cache_retention_tip: When enabled, removes `prompt_cache_retention` from /v1/responses requests before sending to this upstream.
field_filter_safety_identifier_tip: When enabled, removes `safety_identifier` from /v1/responses requests before sending to this upstream.
field_use_chat_completions_for_responses: When enabled, routes inbound `/v1/responses` traffic for this upstream to `/v1/chat/completions`, then converts the chat response back to Responses format.
field_rewrite_developer_role_to_system_t: When enabled, rewrites OpenAI-compatible message role `developer` to `system` before sending the request upstream.
codex_manual_refresh_token_desc: Paste one or more Codex refresh tokens, one per line.
codex_manual_mobile_refresh_token_desc: Paste one or more OpenAI mobile refresh tokens, one per line.
codex_manual_json_desc: Paste Codex token JSON, a JSON array, a nested export, or raw access-token lines.
codex_manual_json_placeholder: access_token JSON, JSON array, or one raw access token per line
codex_login_open_hint: Open the login URL in a browser if it didn't open automatically.
kiro_login_open_hint: Open the login URL in a browser if it didn't open automatically.
model_mappings_tip: Exact: gpt-4, prefix: gpt-4*, wildcard: * (priority: exact > prefix > wildcard).
header_overrides_tip: Overrides apply after auth/anthropic-version injection. Null deletes a header; empty value sets it to empty string.
upstreams_proxy_tip: Leave empty to skip proxy. Use {placeholder} to reference app proxy, or provide a http(s)://, socks5://, socks5h:// proxy URL.
error_app_proxy_url_invalid: App proxy URL is invalid (supports http(s)://, socks5://, socks5h://).
error_upstream_proxy_url_invalid: {id} proxy URL is invalid (supports http(s)://, socks5://, socks5h://).
error_upstream_proxy_url_requires_app: {id} uses $app_proxy_url but app proxy is not configured.
error_header_override_name_required: Header name is required for {id} row {row}.
error_header_override_name_invalid: Header name is invalid for {id} row {row}.
upstreams_columns_description: Select which fields to display in the table.
config_file_help_1: Use the toolbar to save changes back to the JSONC file.
config_file_help_2: Saving writes the JSONC file and automatically reloads or restarts a running proxy when needed. Stopped proxies stay stopped.
config_file_unsaved_notice: You have unsaved changes. Reload will ask for confirmation to avoid overwriting your edits.
config_file_discard_description: This will discard your unsaved changes and reload from the config file.
client_setup_desc: Write local config files so tools can use Token Proxy directly.
client_setup_dirty_notice: You have unsaved proxy changes. Save first to avoid writing stale settings.
client_setup_claude_desc: Writes ~/.claude/settings.json (env) to point Claude Code at Token Proxy.
client_setup_codex_desc: Writes ~/.codex/config.toml and ~/.codex/auth.json so Codex can use Token Proxy.
client_setup_opencode_desc: Writes ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json[c] and ~/.local/share/opencode/auth.json so OpenCode can use Token Proxy.
client_setup_opencode_models_empty: No models detected. Add an exact model mapping (no "*") in Upstreams, then refresh.
client_setup_backup_hint: A .token_proxy.bak file is created before overwriting.
client_setup_plaintext_warning: Note: this writes tokens to disk in plain text. Keep your home directory secure.
update_desc: Check and install the latest stable release.
update_status_installed: Installed. Restart the app to finish.
update_restart_prompt_desc: Restart now to finish installing the update?
proxy_service_desc: Safe stop/restart and manual config reload.
proxy_service_help_1: The proxy reads configuration from the JSONC file on disk. Save first; running proxies apply the latest disk config automatically.
proxy_service_help_2: Use Reload or Restart here when you want to re-apply disk config manually, especially while the proxy is stopped.
proxy_service_unsaved_notice: You have unsaved changes. Restart/Reload is disabled to avoid applying stale disk config.
dashboard_subtitle: Overview of requests and token usage
dashboard_upstream_models_desc: Available models discovered on proxy start, upstream config changes, and manual refresh
dashboard_recent_desc: Sorted by time desc · {pageSize} per page · {total} total
logs_capture_desc: Captures request headers/bodies and response bodies for 10 minutes. Turning it off stops writing these details.
logs_capture_idle_desc: Click the power button to capture request and response details for 10 minutes.
logs_capture_status_ready: Enabled: capture request details for 10 minutes
logs_capture_status_idle: Request details are not captured by default
logs_detail_desc: Headers/body appear only when capture is enabled; error responses are always recorded for failed requests.
model_pricing_reset_confirm_description: This will replace the current model pricing table with the built-in defaults and recalculate logged request costs.
model_pricing_error_at_least_one: At least one model price is required.
model_pricing_error_price_number: {field} must be a number greater than or equal to 0.
model_pricing_error_threshold: Long context threshold must be a positive integer.
model_pricing_reset_failed: Failed to restore default model pricing
error_retryable_failure_cooldown_secs_in: Retryable failure cooldown must be a non-negative integer.
error_upstream_no_data_timeout_secs_inte: Upstream no-data timeout must be an integer greater than or equal to 3.
error_openai_response_header_timeout_sec: OpenAI response header timeout must be a non-negative integer.
error_upstream_at_least_one: At least one upstream is required.
error_upstream_at_least_one_enabled: At least one enabled upstream is required.
error_upstream_priority_integer: Upstream {id} priority must be an integer.
error_account_priority_integer: Account {id} priority must be an integer.
error_upstream_strategy_delay_ms_positiv: Hedge delay must be a positive integer.
error_upstream_strategy_max_parallel_min: Max parallel must be an integer greater than or equal to {min}.
error_upstream_multiple_api_keys_unsuppo: Upstream {id} does not support multiple API keys for account-based providers.
error_model_mapping_pattern_required: Upstream {id} mapping row {row} pattern is required.
error_model_mapping_target_required: Upstream {id} mapping row {row} target is required.
error_model_mapping_wildcard_multiple: Upstream {id} can only define one wildcard mapping "*".
error_model_mapping_prefix_required: Upstream {id} mapping row {row} prefix cannot be empty.
providers_refresh_all_codex_tokens_empty: No Codex accounts with auto refresh enabled.
